context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the load-context instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Load minimum context before any code, spec, or PRD in an existing Rails codebase. A fifteen-second read of `db/schema.rb`, `config/routes.rb`, and one neighbor saves a full retry.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Load baseline Rails context:** Read at minimum:

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Load one neighbor of each kind:** For each Rails layer touched, open the nearest sibling that already solves a similar problem — a comparable controller, service, spec, factory. Use grep to find: `grep -r "class.*Controller" app/controllers`, `grep -r "class.*Service" app/services`, etc.

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Every invocation of this skill MUST produce a **Context Summary** in this exact shape, before any code or spec is proposed:

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **One neighbor per layer.** Do not dump 5 similar files; pick the closest match and name it.
